shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/.codex/skills/.system/nowledge-mem/working-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- repo ---\\n' && git status --short --branch && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g 'package.json' -g 'src/date_utils.ts' -g '*date_utils*' | head -80"
